title: selaginella squamulosa
intro: Selaginella squamulosa, also known as the squamulose spikemoss, is a type of small, terrestrial plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help to alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella squamulosa include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Selaginella squamulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
